name: Apple- Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg with juice or milk, oil, and vanilla extract.
2. Stir in the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt until just combined.
3. Mix in the chopped nuts and diced apples.
4. Fill prepared muffin tins (greased or lined with paper) with the batter.
5. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the top of each muffin.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Note: Cinnamon-sugar mixture can be made by combining equal parts ground cinnamon and granulated sugar.
